title: Tuna & Beans with Crispy Chilli Capers
summary: A simple plate of beans and tuna with a spicy crispy caper topping. Job's done in just fifteen minutes.

ingredients.label: 500g Drained Cooked Cannellini Beans (keep the liquid)
ingredients.name: Drained Cooked Cannellini Beans

method.description: Add a generous drizzle of olive oil to a saucepan, then set it over a medium heat. Finely chop the chilli. Once hot, add the pine nuts, chilli and capers. Cook until the pine nuts have turned golden, then transfer everything to a bowl.

Tip the tuna ragù and drained beans into the empty pan, turn the heat up to medium-high and reheat. If the mixture is too dry, add a splash of the reserved bean liquid. Taste and season with salt and pepper, if needed.
Share the bean mixture between bowls and top with the crispy chilli caper drizzle.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
